title: Fix material transaction 2x duplication
description: Skip **** summary lines in material/outplant sections of parse_full_cost_detail.py. Prevents double-counting. Expected: 780K → 390K rows.

title: Fix Informer capture: use Data tab instead of launch=true
description: capture_all_reports.py — launch=true opens Report Template (Access Denied for Consumer role). Must navigate with launch=false then click Data tab to trigger ViewRPCService|getData RPC. Data tab element not yet identified in DOM.

title: Fix ERP login/SSO reliability
description: SSO link with token (?u=USER&t=TOKEN) is intermittently absent from ERP DOM after login. Fallback to /eaglesign/sso without token shows unauthenticated login page. Need reliable SSO flow.

title: Phase 4: Ingest local Excel/CSV files
description: ingest_local_files.py — Scan H:\ and OneDrive for structured data. 13 local sources ingested as tier-4 data.

title: Request UniVerse ODBC access from KeyedIn
description: Meeting with KeyedIn Sign 2026-02-03. Ask for: (1) ODBC connection string to UniVerse DB, (2) data dictionary, (3) session management. This eliminates all browser scraping if granted. See SYSTEM_KNOWLEDGE_BASE.md section 15.

title: Phase 6: Decision engine
description: decision_engine.py — 8 analytical modules (estimating accuracy, profitability, capacity, shop efficiency, material analysis, customer analytics, vendor performance, cash flow).

title: Capture all 30 Informer report payloads
description: Run capture_all_reports.py for all 30 reports. Capture ViewRPCService getData requests + responses. Save to keyedin-capture/reports/. Depends on: Data tab fix, SSO fix, license quota fix.

title: Phase 5: Build warehouse DB
description: build_warehouse.py — Merge Phase 1 + Phase 4 into eagle_warehouse.db (211 MB, 17 tables, 19 indexes, trust-based upsert).

title: Full KeyedIn Data Extraction to Warehouse
description: Extract ALL data from KeyedIn ERP (UniVerse/Pick) and Informer BI into eagle_warehouse.db. 5 extraction vectors, 30 Informer reports, 240+ ERP processes.

title: Rebuild warehouse with material dedup + Informer data
description: Re-run parse_full_cost_detail.py (with dedup fix) then build_warehouse.py. Add Informer CSV ingestion as tier-2 source. Expected: material_transactions drops ~50%, new tables from Informer reports.

title: Resolve ERP license quota exhaustion
description: Multiple Playwright launches consumed all concurrent sessions. Error: YOU HAVE EXCEEDED YOUR LICENSE QUOTA. Need: (1) session cleanup, (2) try/finally browser.close() in all scripts, (3) single-browser-context reuse.

title: Phase 1: Parse 168 HTML batch files
description: parse_full_cost_detail.py — 168 HTML Cost Summary batches → 5 CSVs (wo_headers, labor_detail, labor_summary, material_detail, outplant_detail). 33,428 WOs, 1.38M rows.

title: Discover Informer export download URL
description: Export Results dialog triggers 3 GWT RPCs but actual file download URL never captured. Need to intercept ALL requests after Export button click. 6 URL patterns tested, all 404. Try: /informer/ExportServlet, /informer/download.

title: Generalize fast_extract.py for multiple ERP processes
description: Extract process-specific config into dict: {process_id, form_fields, logkey_pattern, output_pattern}. Two output patterns: A=HTML spool, B=CSV download. Targets: EXPORT.WO.LABOR.ANALYSIS, LIST.AP.DET, EMP.HOURS.BY.DATE.

title: Extract all captured reports to CSV via HTTP
description: Run scrape_informer.py to replay captured payloads via HTTP. Uses replay_view_rpc() for view payloads, run_report_command() for cmd payloads. 3-tier field discovery. Output: CSV per report.

title: GWT RPC v7 parser
description: gwt_parser.py — Full parser for GWT RPC v7 responses. RTL deserialization, field discovery, row extraction. 5 public functions.
